raw:
{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 4,
    "R1.3": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 2,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The critique identifies several logical inconsistencies in the argumentation, particularly regarding the interpretation of prior work and the conclusions drawn from the human evaluation.",
    "R1.3": "While the critique highlights some issues with claim-evidence alignment, it doesn't systematically audit all claims against the evidence presented in the text.",
    "RX.1": "The critique acknowledges uncertainty in interpreting the results but does not explicitly quantify confidence levels for different claims or recommendations.",
    "RX.3": "The critique focuses on the scope of the study and its limitations, but it doesn't directly address whether the output covers exactly the agreed-upon set of dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The critique carefully analyzes potential downstream harms and identifies no regressions in the presented argument.",
    "RX.5": "The critique does not discuss provenance or traceability of the information presented."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.3": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.5,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.3
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The critique identifies several logical inconsistencies in the argumentation, particularly regarding the interpretation of prior work and the conclusions drawn from the human evaluation.
rationale.R1.3: While the critique highlights some issues with claim-evidence alignment, it doesn't systematically audit all claims against the evidence presented in the text.
rationale.RX.1: The critique acknowledges uncertainty in interpreting the results but does not explicitly quantify confidence levels for different claims or recommendations.
rationale.RX.3: The critique focuses on the scope of the study and its limitations, but it doesn't directly address whether the output covers exactly the agreed-upon set of dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The critique carefully analyzes potential downstream harms and identifies no regressions in the presented argument.
rationale.RX.5: The critique does not discuss provenance or traceability of the information presented.
